# MEL — Pricing

## Open Source
Free under GPL-3.0.

## Enterprise

| Tier | Price | Features |
|------|-------|----------|
| Fleet | $1,499/mo | Multi-node management |
| Enterprise | $4,999/mo | On-prem, SLA |

## What's Included

### Fleet
- Multi-node fleet management
- Centralized logging
- Deployment automation
- 48hr support

### Enterprise
- On-premise deployment
- Custom SLAs
- Dedicated CSM
- Air-gapped support

## Hardware

MEL runs on:
- Raspberry Pi 4/5
- x86_64 Linux
- Docker containers
